title: Allegro Microsystems Inc (ALGM) Q1 2026 Earnings Highlights
text: Allegro Microsystems delivered robust first-quarter results with revenue reaching $203 million, representing a 5% sequential uptick and 22% year-over-year expansion. The company achieved a gross margin of 48.2%, up 260 basis points from the prior quarter, while operating margin improved to 11.1% of sales compared to 9% in Q4. Non-GAAP earnings per share came in at $0.09, surpassing guidance midpoint expectations. The company generated $62 million in operating cash flow and $51 million in free cash flow, equivalent to 25% of sales. The organization achieved more than 75% of design wins in strategic focus areas, including e-mobility. E-mobility sales climbed 16% sequentially and 31% year-over-year, driven by current sensors for electric vehicle applications. Industrial and other segments grew 11% sequentially with a 50% year-over-year increase. Automotive sales advanced 3% sequentially with 13% year-over-year growth, reflecting sector recovery signals. Allegro reduced net debt to $181 million from $224 million, following a voluntary $35 million debt repayment. Inventory efficiency improved to 141 days outstanding from 148 days previously.
